title: Execute Command node only processes the first hostname
symptom: When executing a workflow to ping multiple hostnames, only the first hostname is processed, and no messages are sent for the others.
applies_when: Workflow is triggered by a manual or scheduled trigger
not_this_if: Code node is not properly connected to the trigger node
root_cause: The Execute Command node must be properly connected to a trigger node to process multiple items. If the workflow starts from a node that does not output multiple items, it will only execute for the first item.
fix_steps: Ensure the Execute Command node is connected to a trigger node (like Manual Trigger or Schedule Trigger).
Rearrange the nodes so that the trigger node comes before the Code node that generates the list of hostnames.
agent_instruction: Connect the Execute Command node to a trigger node to ensure it processes all hostnames.
